title: coap_keys.c: is_local_admin accepts all link-local addresses as admin
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c
Lines: 850-856

SECURITY: The admin access check is too permissive:
```c
/* Link-local addresses on BLE LCI interface are local */
if (net_ipv6_is_ll_addr(&in6->sin6_addr)) {
    return true;
}
```

Any link-local address is accepted as local admin. This allows any neighbor on the same link to modify the key store via PUT/DELETE /keys/{iid}. Should additionally check:
1. The interface index (sin6_scope_id) matches the BLE LCI interface
2. Or use OSCORE authentication for admin operations

Impact: Unauthorized key modification by any mesh neighbor.

Category: SECURITY - authentication bypass
close_reason: Fixed: is_local_admin now verifies sin6_scope_id matches SLIP LCI interface index before accepting link-local addresses as admin. Prevents mesh neighbors from modifying key store.
